product_name: DON'T BREAK THE BOTTLE WINE PUZZLE - ORIGINAL

bullets: A unique, amusing, and entertaining house warming gift.
Follow the instructions to lock up a bottle of wine or alcohol in the wooden puzzle.
Watch the fun start to flow as they try to set the bottle free.
Appeals to home, gift, and wine market.
Set up instructions and solution are included.
content.description: The next time you are invited to a friend's home for dinner, bring along their favourite bottle of wine locked within this perplexing wooden puzzle. Our original wood edition from the popular Don't Break The Bottle of puzzlers continues to spark conversation and bring smiles and a bit of perplexity to the dinner table.

attributes.whats_in_box: 2 wooden puzzle pieces, 1 locking device, instructions.

compliance.choking_hazard: Yes - Small Parts; Warning label on product packaging.
